summary: Added `Fibo_Codex/strategy_abstraction_decision.md` to document the chosen plain-function strategy style, define what recursive and iterative strategies own versus shared comparison concerns, and record extension rules that keep the initial comparison layer minimal instead of overengineered. The dependency note files referenced in the task context were not present in this worktree, so this task used the provided dependency summaries as source context and recorded the decision directly in the existing `Fibo_Codex/` planning area.
